InstructionData.Title: HVAC Radiator Heating Element (water_sun)
InstructionData.Author: Scriptslol
InstructionData.Instructions:
#################################################### # HVAC Radiator Heating Element (water/sun) #################################################### alias heatPumpIn d0 alias heatPumpOut d1 alias hotPipeAna d2 alias radiator d3 alias sunSensor d4
alias isHeating r1 alias isSunVisible r2 alias currentTemp r3
define maxTemp 353 # 80c define LiquidTanks 608607718
loop:
lb currentTemp LiquidTanks Temperature Average
jal updateRadiator
j loop
updateRadiator:
l r0 sunSensor SolarIrradiance sgtz isSunVisible r0
slt r0 currentTemp maxTemp
and isHeating isSunVisible r0
s radiator Open isHeating l r0 sunSensor Horizontal s radiator Horizontal r0
s heatPumpIn On isHeating s heatPumpOut On isHeating
j ra
